news.title: Stock Market Today: Indexes Mixed; S&P 500 Barely Holds This Significant Level (Live Coverage)
news.description: The stock market closed mixed Thursday, with the Nasdaq composite down 0.5%.  The bullish mood that Micron Technology's earnings report engendered didn't spread to many of the major tech stocks.  The Nasdaq closed below its 50-day line for a third straight day.
